judgment.summary: Amazon exhibits robust growth in revenue and earnings, supported by strong margins and a significant cash position, despite a notable debt load.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 68.2%; next earnings date is 2026-07-30.
positives: Earnings growth 74.8% YoY and quarterly earnings growth 76.7% indicate strong profitability expansion.
Revenue growth 16.6% YoY demonstrates continued top-line expansion.
Profit margin 12.2% and Return on equity 24.3% show effective profit generation and shareholder returns.
Free cash flow $9.81B TTM provides substantial operational liquidity.
Analyst consensus is 'strong buy' with a mean target price of $312.63.
negatives: Debt/Equity ratio of 53.30 and total debt $235.54B vs total cash $143.09B indicate significant leverage.
PEG ratio of 1.83 suggests the stock may be trading at a premium relative to its expected earnings growth.
Current ratio 1.18 and quick ratio 0.97 are modest, indicating limited short-term liquidity.

news.paragraph: Amazon stock is garnering positive attention on Wall Street, with recent headlines highlighting its expansion into AI-powered shopping guides and its strong performance relative to peers like Meta. The company's strategic investments in artificial intelligence appear to be resonating with analysts, contributing to a positive outlook. Traders should note the upcoming earnings date as a potential catalyst for further price movement.

headlines.title: As Meta Misfires And Nvidia Shines, Amazon Stock Has Wall Street Smiling. Here's Why.
Amazon.com, Inc. (AMZN) Expands with AI-Powered Shopping Guides
